descriptionHtml:
Test Case:
TUU-T793 - Saved Search Tab Applies Filters & Updates Table

Objective:
Verify that:

  • Clicking a saved search tab applies filters
  • Table data updates correctly
  • Filter state is reflected in the UI

Expected:

  • Filters applied instantly
  • Table updates based on saved search criteria
statusMessage:
AssertionError: Locator expected to be visible
Actual value: None
Error: element(s) not found 
Call log:

statusTrace:
page = <Page url='https://d1lifbniuc73oj.cloudfront.net/'>

    def test_saved_search_tab_applies_filters_updates_table(page: Page):
        """
        Test Case:
        TUU-T793 - Saved Search Tab Applies Filters & Updates Table
    
        Objective:
        Verify that:
        - Clicking a saved search tab applies filters
        - Table data updates correctly
        - Filter state is reflected in the UI
    
        Expected:
        - Filters applied instantly
        - Table updates based on saved search criteria
        """
    
        # ==========================================================
        # Step 1: Navigate to Login Page
        # ==========================================================
        page.goto(
            "https://d1lifbniuc73oj.cloudfront.net/auth/login"
        )
    
        # ==========================================================
        # Step 2: Login to Application
        # ==========================================================
        user_id_input = page.get_by_role(
            "textbox",
            name="User ID"
        )
    
        password_input = page.get_by_role(
            "textbox",
            name="Password"
        )
    
        expect(user_id_input).to_be_visible()
    
        expect(password_input).to_be_visible()
    
        user_id_input.fill("CSASINHN")
    
        password_input.fill("GOLD950")
    
        page.get_by_role(
            "button",
            name="Login"
        ).click()
    
        # ==========================================================
        # Step 3: Navigate to Orders List
        # ==========================================================
        orders_menu = page.get_by_role(
            "complementary"
        ).get_by_role(
            "button",
            name="Orders",
            exact=True
        )
    
        expect(orders_menu).to_be_visible()
    
        orders_menu.click()
    
        # ==========================================================
        # Step 4: Verify Orders Page Loaded
        # ==========================================================
        orders_tab = page.get_by_role(
            "button",
            name="MayMonthOrder", exact=True
        )
